title: Recommendation Engine Batch + Online
summary: Blend batch candidate generation and online ranking into a starter recommender workflow.
knowledge_base: Recommendation Engine Batch + Online is positioned as a Commerce AI starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Blend batch candidate generation and online ranking into a starter recommender workflow.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on recommendations, ranking, commerce.
